assumptions: No Pipedrive user, company, company domain, trial, API permission, API token, deals, Postman installation, collection, or environment is assumed.
A supported computer, browser, email or Google account, and permission to install Postman are available.
No signup, Google authorization, reCAPTCHA, verification, company onboarding, API enablement, token retrieval, software installation, or API request was performed during research.

developer_goal: Create a Pipedrive trial and company, retrieve the company-specific API token, and make the official direct cURL request to list deals.

first_success.outcome: An authenticated `GET https://{companydomain}.pipedrive.com/api/v2/deals` request returns HTTP 200 and a JSON body whose `success` field is true, whether the data array contains deals or is empty.
first_success.observable_signal: The Deals endpoint reference shows a 200 OK response with `success: true`, `data`, and `additional_data`; business data is not required to prove API transport and authentication success.

route_selection.surface: Pipedrive API-token first request through cURL
route_selection.rule: Select the lexicographically shortest complete official route to the same first-success outcome after fixing product intent; if peer routes remain consequential, mark needs-human-judgment.

candidates.name: Pipedrive API-token first request through cURL
candidates.reason: Recorded as a reconstructable candidate, but public evidence does not close signup-field opacity and/or peer-route lexicographic selection for a verified count.

candidates.name: Insomnia API-token route
candidates.reason: Insomnia is a documented peer and converges on the same token-authenticated request. Postman is listed first and has a direct collection authorization sequence.

candidates.name: Direct cURL request
candidates.reason: The authentication page shows a concise cURL example, but the dedicated first-request guide centers Postman and Insomnia.

candidates.name: OAuth app and Marketplace path
candidates.reason: Pipedrive sends app builders to OAuth. The API-token route is the shorter own-account path and avoids app registration and user installation before the first API response.

required_path.action: Complete Pipedrive account creation or trial signup at the official entry URL.

required_fields.label: Signup identity and required account fields
required_fields.notes: Public evidence does not establish the complete current required field set behind the client-rendered or authenticated signup surface.

required_path.observable_result: A new Pipedrive account or trial session exists.

required_path.action: Complete any required email or identity verification for the new account.
required_path.observable_result: The account becomes usable for developer onboarding.

required_path.action: Complete the documented post-login setup for the selected Pipedrive candidate through first success.

required_fields.label: Candidate-specific configuration
required_fields.notes: Exact fields depend on unresolved product, auth, or framework selection.

required_path.observable_result: The Deals endpoint reference shows a 200 OK response with `success: true`, `data`, and `additional_data`; business data is not required to prove API transport and authentication success.

prerequisites.description: {'order': 1, 'type': 'account', 'requirement': 'Create or access a Pipedrive trial account and its company workspace.', 'required': True, 'source_ids': ['S2', 'S3']}
{'order': 2, 'type': 'permission', 'requirement': 'Have API access enabled for the user; if the API tab is absent, follow the company API-enablement route.', 'required': True, 'source_ids': ['S3']}
{'order': 3, 'type': 'domain', 'requirement': 'Know the company domain used in the Pipedrive API base URL.', 'required': True, 'source_ids': ['S4']}

external_gates.description: Email signup requires a work email and the public page is protected by reCAPTCHA.
Signing up accepts Pipedrive's Terms of Service and Privacy Notice.
Work email and Google are peer initial signup methods with different identity paths.

unavoidable_waits.description: Email or identity-provider verification delivery when the selected account route requires it.

platform_outcomes.description: Make the first request to the Pipedrive API with an API token.

excluded.item: Creating or mutating CRM records, pagination, rate-limit handling, building an OAuth app, Marketplace publication, token rotation, production secret storage, and multi-user integration behavior occur
excluded.reason: Listed as excluded after success in the source record.

sources.title: Pipedrive API in Postman or Insomnia
evidence_supported: Primary documented developer route and first-success framing

uncertainties.question: What exact current required signup, identity, legal, and entitlement fields does Pipedrive show for a new developer, and which peer route is the lexicographic shortest path?
uncertainties.impact: Without those fields and a closed route choice, action and field counts cannot be verified for peer comparison.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated read-only walkthrough of the live signup and the selected post-login first-success path, with screenshots of required fields and confirmation that peer routes are longer or gated.
